---
title: "STATS19 Pedestrian Pavement analysis"
format: gfm
  # docx:
  #   toc: true
  #   number-sections: true
  #   highlight-style: github
editor: source
---
Reproducible analysis and plots of pavement pedestrian fatalities from STATS19 data.

To generate the plots below, clone repository and run "analysis.R".

The plot below shows fatalities by year and summary vehicle category. Motor vehicle category is to summarise large, fast vehicles. Breakdown in categories.

```{r,echo=FALSE}

cat_table = readRDS("vehicle_categories.RDS")
knitr::kable(cat_table)

```

![](plots/pavement_fatalities.png)

Where did they happen, grouped by Local Authority region (LA) for England and Wales

![](plots/pavement_fatalities_la.png)

grouped by Medium Super Output Area (MSOA)

![](plots/pavement_fatalities_msoa.png)
What was the IMD of casualties involved?

![](plots/pavement_fatalities_imd.png)
What was the age groups of casualties involved?

![](plots/pavement_fatalities_age.png)
